title: dryopteris conformis
intro: Dryopteris conformis, also known as the ladder fern or button fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Dryopteris conformis include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Dryopteris conformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
